purpose: Initial mechanism-first search bounds. Cleavage parameters are inherited from the selected base row and K0(T) is not scored.
constraints_to_apply_after_generation: Peierls and Taylor barriers must remain positive over the full stress-temperature screening domain.
The full Peierls barrier surface should not exceed the Taylor barrier surface where the intended mechanism requires transport before release.
rho_source0_m2 is a physical areal density; source_sites_per_system is not used by the v9.12 constitutive law.
The slip interaction matrix, mean-free-path coefficient, elastic kernels, source-zone dimensions, and annihilation capture radius are common physics and are not optimized.
